important_notes:
In the event that a Registered Vehicle is unavailable at Madhav Tiger Reserve for safari, the park management may permit the use of a Private Vehicle at standard buffer rates.
Visitors are required to hire a guide from Tiger Reserve during their visit. Additional charges for the guide and park vehicles must be paid separately at the gate.
Dear Customer, To get permission of “Single Day Photography Shoot” please contact to Field Director of Concern Park.
For more details...Click Here
The entry time for all core and buffer zones (Morning Safari Only) of Pench Tiger Reserve has been changed from 02 February 2025 to 08 February 2025.

Dear Customer, Forest has proposed for rate increase if same get approved you will required to pay the difference amount at time of your safari at the park counter.
For Permit booking,cancellation and add on Related Query please contact at MPOnline
                        Customer Care: 0755 - 6720266 Email Id:forest@mponline.gov.in
Every Day at 11:00 A.M. Safari Booking of 120th Day will be opened
Dear Customer, Would like to inform you that the charges for Vehicle and Guide will
                        be extra same will be collected during the time of your Excursion at the park, Amount
                        of Vehicle and Guide is not included in your Online booked Permit.
Booking can be cancel one day before from Safari date before 5:00 PM of Tiger Safari parks
                        Cancellation amount will be calculated as per slab on department fees given in the Rule book
                         plus Rs 100 will be charge as MPOnline cancellation fees for Full vehicle and Rs 20 per 
                        person in Single seat.
If Registered Vehicle is not available at the Pipariya gate for Safari than park
                        management can allow private Vehicle also on normal buffer rates.
Dear Tourist, Bookings made under Ratapani Sanctuary will not have option of Cancellation / Addon / Re-Scheduling of Permit,
                        So you are requested to book the permits once you are sure for the visit to the park.
Cancellation after reschedule will not be permitted w.e.f. 11th May 2023.
